title: Zellige Ocean Blue
description: Authentic hand-cut Zellige tiles from Fez, Morocco. Each tile is individually crafted by master artisans, creating a unique rippled surface that catches light beautifully.
creator: Fez Artisan Collective

title: Carrara White Marble
description: Quarried from the legendary Carrara mountains of Tuscany. The soft white ground with delicate grey veining makes it a timeless choice for luxury interiors.
creator: Tuscany Stone Co.

title: Rustic Terracotta Heritage
description: Sun-dried and kiln-fired using ancient Andalusian methods. This terracotta brings warmth and earthy authenticity to any floor.
creator: Casa del Barro

title: Forest Slate Mosaic
description: Sourced from the slate-rich highlands of Rajasthan. The deep green undertones evoke a sense of forest floor serenity.
creator: Rajasthan Stone Works

title: Geometric Ceramic Clay
description: Precision-moulded geometric patterns pressed from fine white clay and fired at 1200°C. The matte glaze works beautifully as a feature wall.
creator: Estudio Valencia

title: Industrial Cement Grey
description: Poured and pressed using Portland cement blend. The uniform grey surface offers raw industrial elegance.
creator: Studio Beton

title: Sage Green Encaustic
description: Traditional encaustic tiles hand-poured with pigmented cement layers. The sage green palette creates a calming atmosphere.
creator: Maison Carreaux

title: Midnight Black Porcelain
description: Ultra-dense porcelain achieving a deep obsidian-like surface. Near-zero porosity makes it ideal for high-traffic and wet areas.
creator: Ceramica Italia
